title: gardenia racemulosa
intro: Gardenia racemulosa, also known as Cape jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Asia and is a member of the gardenia family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gardenia racemulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Gardenia racemulosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
